fonts.name: Anton
fonts.description: Massive, bold, brutalist for headlines, representing the heavy beat of eletrofunk.

fonts.name: Space Mono
fonts.description: Technical and raw. Creates contrast with Anton. Perfect for data like CPF, form labels, and rankings.

typography.guidelines: Headings MUST be huge, uppercase, and have tight tracking (`tracking-tighter`). Body text is monospace for a 'raw data/hacker/favela cyberpunk' aesthetic. Never use standard SaaS Inter.

colors.guidelines: No soft gradients. Use sharp, high-contrast neon elements against deep void black. Focus on purple, magenta, neon cyan, and black based on the provided hero background.

visual_enhancers: Glitch text effects on hover for headings.
Marquee running text (`ELETROFUNK - MANDELÃO - CACHORRADA`) as section dividers using `react-fast-marquee`.
1px neon borders with `box-shadow` to create glow effects on cards.
Noise texture overlay across the entire app (`pointer-events-none`) to avoid digital flatness.

layouts.hero: 100vh full-screen. Background image with deep purple/black gradient overlay to ensure text readability. Huge 'Anton' typography. Logo at top center. Call-to-action button to enter/vote.
layouts.voting_section: Bento grid structure. Left side: Lead capture form (Nome, CPF, Email, WhatsApp, Estado) heavily styled, right side: Live Ranking of DJs with monospace numbers.
layouts.dj_profiles: Asymmetrical grid of DJ cards. Images inside harsh rectangular crops. Hovering the card shifts it and changes border to cyan or magenta. SEO optimized headings.
layouts.events: Brutalist list layout. Massive dates taking up 30% of width, event details, and a loud WhatsApp button for tickets.
layouts.blog: Grid of articles for SEO. Title overlaid on dark images with a neon underline.
layouts.footer: Massive typography. CNPJ and Instagram clearly visible. Darkest background.

motion.guidelines: Sharp, fast animations. Use `framer-motion` for scroll reveals. Avoid slow/soft ease-in-out. The motion should feel like a strobe light—punchy.

component_rules.forms: Use Shadcn UI. Inputs must have black backgrounds, 1px neon border (magenta or cyan) on focus. No rounded corners (`rounded-none`).
component_rules.buttons: Brutalist block buttons. Sharp corners. Hover state: invert colors (e.g., text black, bg magenta) and add heavy drop shadow.
component_rules.cards: Transparent black background `bg-black/40`, backdrop blur, 1px border. No soft shadows, use harsh offset shadows if any.

libraries: framer-motion (for scroll reveals and glitch animation)

accessibility.contrast: Ensure white text over the neon colors passes APCA/WCAG. Use text shadows when text is over images.
accessibility.focus: All focus states should have a 2px offset solid cyan ring.
accessibility.audio: Audio MUST NOT autoplay without user interaction. Provide a clear 'PLAY AUDIO' or ensure the first interaction (like clicking a button on the hero) starts it.

specific_instructions: Implement an audio element that plays a sample of mandelão/eletrofunk upon the user's first click on the document.
Add 'ELETROFUNK', 'CACHORRADA', 'FUNK RAVE' heavily into meta tags and visually in a scrolling marquee for SEO.
The voting form must capture Nome, CPF, Email, WhatsApp, Estado. Use Shadcn components for this.
Ticket purchases link directly to WhatsApp using standard api.whatsapp.com links.
Footer MUST contain CNPJ: 21.534.683-0001/37 and Instagram: @jonatasbeirao.
Remove any Emergent badges from the layout.
No generic rounded SaaS UI. Keep it sharp (`rounded-none`), aggressive, and high contrast.
universal_guidelines_for_main_agent: Use modern pill or sharp styles for buttons depending on theme (here, sharp brutalist).
Create depth with z-index and glassmorphism.
Add data-testid to all interactive elements.
